message:
fix(ci): Increase benchmark timeout to 60 minutes

The benchmark build phase can take 10+ minutes due to WASM compilation,
and parallel builds compete for resources. Previous 45-minute timeout
was insufficient when builds run in parallel without shared cache.

files.patch:
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@ concurrency:
 jobs:
   benchmark:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    timeout-minutes: 45
+    timeout-minutes: 60
     strategy:
       matrix:
         benchmark:
